                  1. Home

                  About CVS Health®

                  CVS Health is building a world of health around every consumer. Our unmatched reach allows us to deliver high-quality, affordable health care when and how individuals choose. We’re on a mission to deliver superior and more connected experiences, lower the cost of care and improve the health and well-being of those we serve.

                  Who we are

                  As a leading health solutions company, we offer multiple channels to access health care locally and nationally. Our strong community presence, tech-forward approach and unmatched engagement with more than 100 million people enable us to deliver high-quality, personalized, affordable health care.   

                  Learn about our purpose

                  What we do

                  Our strategy

                  We’re redefining health care by engaging consumers in unparalleled ways, and providing access to high-quality, affordable care when and how individuals choose.

                  Explore our strategy

                  Our people

                  Our diverse, purpose-driven team of more than 300,000 colleagues has a singular focus: Simplifying health care and improving the health and well-being of every person, family and community we serve.

                  Together, we’re shaping the future of health care in America — guided by empathy, innovation, integrity and an unwavering commitment to safety and quality.

                  Find out about working at CVS Health

                  Our leadership

                  Our executive leadership team has deep experience that spans the health care industry and beyond. Together with our colleagues, we are shaping the future of health care.

                  Meet our executives

                  Public policy

                  We collaborate with local, state and national policymakers to improve access to care, lower costs and address health disparities. 

                  Learn about our policy initiatives

                  Inclusion & Belonging

                  We are committed to driving diversity, equity and inclusion in every part of our business, from sourcing products with diverse suppliers to ensuring our colleagues reflect  the communities we serve. 

                  Find out how we promote inclusion and belonging

                  Connected care at your fingertips

                  Our mobile apps connect you to our products and services — anytime, anywhere — making it easier to take care of your health on your terms.

                  • Aetna HealthSM app

                    • Download from the App Store
                    • Get it from Google Play

                    • Get it on Google Play
